productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Light Winter White Tops
description: CompositionWhite t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neckline, mega sleeves, round neckline with a net panel and ribbon flowers spilling from it, and a graphic print with sequin detailing on it on the frontFittingRegularWash careHand wash cold using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this white t-shirt from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The ribbon flowers appliqued on the net panel together with the corset print on the front lends this tee an edgy feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with slim Fit jeans and black heels and ooze style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
